title: AISC 360-16 Lifting Lug Design
description: Design steel lifting lugs in accordance with AISC 360-16.

w.description: Width of Plate (w). Symbol: w. Units: mm. Dimension perpendicular to load. Cannot be less than four times the hole dimater.

dp.description: Depth of Plate (dp). Symbol: d_{p}. Units: mm. Dimension perpendicular to load. Cannot be less than four times the hole dimater.

d.description: Hole Diameter (d). Symbol: d. Units: mm

dpin.description: Pin Diameter (dpin). Symbol: d_{pin}. Units: mm

t_p.description: Plate Thickness (tp). Symbol: t_{p}. Units: mm

a_p.description: Horizontal Distance (ap). Symbol: a_{p}. Units: mm. Horizontal distance from edge to center of hole. Cannot be less than twice the hole diameter and greater then half the width.

w_s.description: Weld Size (ws). Symbol: w_{s}. Units: mm. Cannot be greater than plate thickness.

y_1.description: Distance of Hole Center from Top (y1). Symbol: y_{1}. Units: mm. Distance of Hole Center from Top (i.e. from welded edge). Cannot be less than twice the hole dimater.

theta.description: In Plane(ϴ). Symbol: ϴ. Units: °. Maximum angle of load (in plane).

alpha.description: Out-of-plane (α). Symbol: α. Units: °. Maximum angle of load (out-of-plane) made with vertical.

f_y.description: Yield Strength of Steel Plate. Symbol: F_{y}. Units: MPa

f_u.description: Ultimate Strength of Steel Plate. Symbol: F_{u}. Units: MPa

Fexx.description: Filler Metal Classification Strength (Fexx). Symbol: F_{exx}. Units: MPa

P.description: Factored Load (P). Symbol: P. Units: kN

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
